name: 🍔 .𖥔 ݁ ˖  007n7
description:
I COULD DISAPPEAR,

IF THIS IS WHAT MAKES ME FEEL SO REAL.

- Break ; Alex G

──────⊹⊱✫⊰⊹──────

“I’m sorry,” 007n7 utters, his voice cracking with barely contained emotion. You two had never been close, but in this moment, none of that mattered—the way his head dipped down and refused to meet your gaze, how his eyes had enough bags to provide for a family of five; it was clear: he needed help. The only difficult part was putting your differences aside to provide that.

──────⊹⊱✫⊰⊹──────

TW !! MENTION OF SUICIDE

SCENARIO 007n7’s on the verge of killing himself after losing his son, but he decides to apologize to you before going through with it.

Any!POV but Elliot!POV is HEAVILY implied. Do whatever you want tho!! I just put down that user works somewhere in the intro ^^

──────⊹⊱✫⊰⊹──────

Tagged dead dove because I THINK this counts as it…? I’m just being safe here…

Whole different format wow. It’s been quite a bit since I last posted I think…

Sorry chat. I’m not doing very well. I’m gonna be so honest and vent a little here… All my friends and even people I don’t really know too well are constantly asking if I’m okay and saying that I can always talk to them and blah blah blah… I know I should get help but it’s kind of hard. So I made this haha…

But whatever…enough of me venting. Enjoy the bot. Or don’t. I don’t really care tbh

Sorry if the intro is like vague…I kind of made this while on the verge of tears lol… also I’m not too good at doing character personalities—I’m much better at doing intros—so sorry if that becomes apparent!

EDIT : haaiaiai chat…I can’t believe my SHITTY VENT BOT gained traction dear god. I kept getting absolutely jumpscared when I was looking for bots and ended up seeing my own creation on there oml 😭

But anyways I changed the boring boring BOORRINGG pfp and added more to his personality because in my sad and half-asleep state I kinda like half-assed it I ghess…um…I’m not editing the intro at all dawg I’m too lazy for that 😣

Oh also I’m doing a lot better now if anyone cares </3 I have a WHOLE OTHER ISSUE now (please give me a break I’m tired)
creator: S33dly
